name: Road Ranger #536 - South Beloit
description: 24-hour truck stop at the I-39/I-90 Exit 1 Wisconsin-border interchange with multiple diesel lanes, about 60 truck spaces, showers, a CAT Scale, Subway and Dan's Pizza.

name: CAT Scale at Road Ranger South Beloit
description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at the Road Ranger truck stop at I-39/I-90 Exit 1 in South Beloit.

name: Pilot Travel Center #535 / Road Ranger - Rockford
description: Pilot-branded Road Ranger travel center in south Rockford at US-20 and S Main St (IL-2), reached from I-90 via the US-20 freeway, with diesel, a CAT Scale and Subway.

name: CAT Scale at Pilot Rockford
description: Certified CAT Scale at the Pilot/Road Ranger travel center at US-20 & S Main St (IL-2) in Rockford, off the I-90/US-20 corridor.

name: Belvidere Oasis (Illinois Tollway Travel Plaza)
description: Over-the-highway Illinois Tollway oasis on I-90 (Jane Addams Tollway) near mile marker 24, accessible both directions, with auto and truck fueling, a food court (McDonald's, Panera, Sbarro, Starbucks), restrooms, free Wi-Fi, EV charging and truck parking.

name: Road Ranger #543 - Hampshire
description: Truck stop at I-90 Exit 42 (US-20) in Hampshire with about 30-35 truck spaces, diesel, showers, a CAT Scale, bulk DEF and Subway.

name: TA Elgin (TravelCenters of America #044)
description: Full-service TA travel center at I-90 Exit 42 (US-20) in Hampshire with about 92 truck spaces, BP diesel, a maintenance/repair shop, showers, a CAT Scale, Country Pride, Burger King and Popeyes.

name: Love's Travel Stop #763
description: Love's travel stop at I-90 Exit 42 (US-20) in Hampshire with about 237 parking spaces, 9 diesel lanes, 7 showers, a CAT Scale, laundry and Arby's.

name: CAT Scale at Love's Hampshire
description: Certified CAT Scale at the I-90 Exit 42 (US-20) truck-stop cluster in Hampshire, co-located at Love's #763 (CAT Scale service also present at the adjacent TA and Road Ranger).

name: Illinois Welcome Center (Turtle Creek)
description: IDOT-run welcome center/rest area on southbound I-39/90 just inside Illinois at South Beloit, with restrooms and car/RV parking; oriented to passenger vehicles and not designed for trucks with trailers.

name: Pomp's Tire Service - Rockford
description: Commercial truck and OTR tire dealer and service center in south Rockford near the I-90/I-39/US-20 corridor, offering fleet tire service, alignment and brakes.

name: Meiborg Enterprises
description: Heavy-duty truck towing/recovery, mobile truck and trailer repair and roadside assistance based in Rockford near I-39/I-90/US-20, serving the I-90 corridor.

name: Rock Valley College - Truck Driver Training
description: Community-college CDL-A truck driver training program in Rockford (5-week cohorts with classroom, yard, simulator and over-the-road), serving the I-90/Rockford corridor.
